subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! I beseech Thee by the Decisive Word whereby the root of doubt was severed and the mystery of Thy Name was made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی اسئلک بفصل الخطاب الذی به قلعت اصل الارتیاب و ظهر سر اسمک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
